title: Typography Process Zine
description: A compact editorial project documenting grid experiments, type pairings, and printed mockups from the first half of the semester.

title: Motion Study Reel
description: A short video test exploring rhythm, crop changes, and timing for an identity animation system.

title: Campus Wayfinding Map
description: A clear navigation concept for a student exhibition route with color-coded zones and low-friction signage.

title: Interactive Portfolio Prototype
description: An external prototype showing a simple student portfolio flow with project previews, transitions, and responsive layouts.

title: Photo Essay Series
description: A sequence of stills built around light, repetition, and urban texture, prepared for a digital gallery presentation.
